comment: SRapi v0.1.0 frontend bundle size budgets. Sizes are in bytes (uncompressed). Brotli/gzip on the wire is much smaller. Run via `node tools/bundle-budget.mjs` after `next build`; web-check.mjs invokes it automatically. Adjust caps only with deliberate review — they are calibrated against the v0.1.0 baseline + room for organic growth.

all-js-chunks.description: Sum of every JS chunk Next.js emits. Catches dependency-bloat regressions across the whole app.

largest-chunk.description: Single largest emitted chunk. Catches accidental imports of huge libs into one route. Adjust only after profiling.
